system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You tap the governing vessel along your foe’s back with the tip of your finger, causing the balance of energy to disrupt as you desire. The victim is overcome with a flood of hot or cold energy. On a Success the target takes 2d10 Damage per Rank of Dianxue as their body is overcome with hot or cold energy. Cathartic: On a Success the target takes 2d10 Damage per Rank of Dianxue. This can be hot or cold energy and continues each round at a reduction of 1d10 until it reaches 0d10 (see next paragraph). This functions like Fire Damage, continuing each round at -1d10 from the previous round until there are no Damage dice left. For example if the opponent takes 4d10 the first round, he takes 3d10 the second, followed by 2d10 on the third.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
